emails.body: FW: Employee List Can you handle?

emails.subject: RE: Employee List
emails.body: Dear Michelle and Richard: The answer is yes, she was an employee of Enron. I will secure her PH file in order to secure her dates of employment. Thanks. Sharon

emails.body: FW: Employee List Sharon, I think it works best for only one of us to respond to these data requests. Would you mind taking that role? Thanks. Michelle
